title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Claude Cowork requires outcome-first prompting rather than task-first prompting. Users should describe desired end results and let Claude Cowork figure out the approach, which differs from the step-by-step guidance needed for Claude Chat.
